title: MCLN_FSMA_EX97_Configuration Guide
fullText:
center 83548 center 290830 EX 97 – Modify iLPN Traceability Configuration Guide 0 0 EX 97 – Modify iLPN Traceability Configuration Guide Table of Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1. Add EX97 System Code PAGEREF _Toc189844153 \h 3 2. Enable Transaction Parameter PAGEREF _Toc189844154 \h 4 3. Post Configuration Instructions   PAGEREF _Toc189844155 \h 9 4. Questions and Answers  PAGEREF _Toc189844156 \h 10 Add EX 97 System Code Navigate to System Code UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for the EX 97 Code ID : Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click Save . Enable Transaction Parameter Navigate to Transactions UI. And filter for Receiving transactions Modify * . Select Modify iLPN and click Program Template to add a parameter . Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter Add a new transaction parameter as below, hit the Save button Add a n additional transaction parameter as below and hit the Save button Select the Modify iLPN transaction and hit the Edit button Navigate to the Parameters tab, find your newly created parameter & enable it . Then click Save . Seach for Split * in the Transaction Name search filter . Select Split Move iLPN and click Program Template to add a parameter. Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction paramete r as below, then hit the Save button . Select the Split Move iLPN transaction and hit the Edit button Navigate to the Parameters tab, find your newly created parameter & enable it. Then click Save . Post Configuration Instructions        Once the configuration has been entered, the following actions need to be taken before the configuration is active:      System Action    Required?    No Action Needed   No   Environment Cache Clear   Yes   Environment Restart   No   App Server Restart   No      To clear the cache – go to the Cache Administration UI, and click the Clear All button.   Questions and Answers       This below table is used to track questions that were asked and answered regarding this enhancement. If the question resulted in any action it is listed against the question.   #    Asked By    Question    Answered By    Answer    Date Added    Action Taken

center 83548 center 290830 EX 97 – Modify iLPN Traceability Configuration Guide 0 0 EX 97 – Modify iLPN Traceability Configuration Guide Table of Contents  1. Add EX97 System Code  2. Enable Transaction Parameter  3. Post Configuration Instructions    4. Questions and Answers   Add EX 97 System Code Navigate to System Code UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for the EX 97 Code ID : Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click Save . Enable Transaction Parameter Navigate to Transactions UI. And filter for Receiving transactions Modify * . Select Modify iLPN and click Program Template to add a parameter . Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter Add a new transaction parameter as below, hit the Save button Add a n additional transaction parameter as below and hit the Save button Select the Modify iLPN transaction and hit the Edit button Navigate to the Parameters tab, find your newly created parameter & enable it . Then click Save . Seach for Split * in the Transaction Name search filter . Select Split Move iLPN and click Program Template to add a parameter. Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction paramete r as below, then hit the Save button . Select the Split Move iLPN transaction and hit the Edit button Navigate to the Parameters tab, find your newly created parameter & enable it. Then click Save . Post Configuration Instructions        Once the configuration has been entered, the following actions need to be taken before the configuration is active:      System Action    Required?    No Action Needed   No   Environment Cache Clear   Yes   Environment Restart   No   App Server Restart   No      To clear the cache – go to the Cache Administration UI, and click the Clear All button.   Questions and Answers       This below table is used to track questions that were asked and answered regarding this enhancement. If the question resulted in any action it is listed against the question.   #    Asked By    Question    Answered By    Answer    Date Added    Action Taken
